record.field: { "allow_create_moves": true, "allow_get_work": true, "allow_move_line_search_sort_order": true, "allow_move_line_search_additional_domain": true, "scan_location_or_pack_first": true, "allow_unreserve_other_moves": true, "allow_ignore_no_putaway_available": true, "allow_alternative_destination": true, "no_prefill_qty": true }
